question.label: Expectation mismatch
question.name: Where do your standards for good work differ from mine right now?
question.description: Names a likely source of misalignment without softening the gap.

answer: A tighter loop on one skill at a time would help me improve.

assessment.note: Deficiency-as-request: he names a missing tighter feedback loop on one skill at a time, signaling strong clarity and growth gaps with mild disengagement; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'one skill at a time' specificity should be picked up next session.
